programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Irene agrees to meet college classmate Andy after years apart and then panics Dr Todd wrote a book about open marriage but finds his own marriage in jeopardy as he meets admirer Nan Adams ex-wife Betty boards with new fiance Lance

programme.desc: Daktari 221

programme.title: Hart to Hart

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful waitress marries the owner of a lumber camp and then quickly starts to realize that he is not what she really wants

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A con artist meets and weds a wealthy old widows through a dating service then murders them and takes the inheritance finally gets the date of his dreams - the very worst of them

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After Natalies brother is fatally wounded by a gunman she prevails upon Nick to turn him into a vampire giving him eternal life

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack pursue an antique beehive containing vampire bees that suck the life out of their victims

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitlers birthday

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Under the impression that Parker is an Ace Gunner Binghamton wagers one of his most prized possessions that Parker can out-shoot an arrogant Captains best gunner

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A lovely French girl agrees to help the guys out in a plan to raise expense money for the birth of Christys child

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers conned into signing a contract for dancing lessons

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter must decide whether or not to re-enlist

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Tight Spot
programme.desc: Sherry is a tough woman with a violent past She is asked by the DA to testify against a mobster but she refuses because other witnesses were murdered Soon she falls in love with a policeman

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: April Lopez returns as a lounge singer Bud and Margarets kids disrupt their parents second honeymoon with constant needs World War 2 veteran Frank and USO entertainer Eve reunite after thirty-five years

programme.title: WKRP 115
programme.desc: WKRP 115

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Fredas new love interest turns out to be the new pastor of her church

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Molly wants to go to an exclusive private school

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: When a Savoy employee is busted with an underage prostitute the sheriff the FBI and the casino all make their play to get the parties to cooperate Meanwhile Dixon and Violets romance heats up

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Street asks Liam to help a friend whos arrested for the murder of a man he hated Liam talks to him and he claims that he dreamed of killing him Liam checks out the evidence and discovers that its overwhelming Liam discovers a device which is of Taelon origin that can allow someone to get into a person dreams Later Daan is attacked and evidence implicates Sandoval Liam offers to help him He asks Sandoval where one can get the device and meets the seller who remains anonymous But they learn that the technology used is made by a woman Renee knows But when shes arrested she denies it And it turns out it is someone else and his next target is Renee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Ann Fisk decides to confront the Swamp Thing that he is in actuality Dr Alec Holland

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A recent storm in the swamp uncovers a car wreck from ten years agoincluding the married couples ghosts that think only hours have passed

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone pursues a bank robber Martin Sheen fearing he will kill a teller he manipulated in order to obtain information

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force seeks to smuggle an valuable scientist with the help of his wife out from behind the iron curtain Soon they discover he doesnt want to leave and have to change plans to convince him otherwise

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is arrested in a play arrest which soon turns real at an annual town celebration in which Marshal Judd tries to hide him from Lt Gerard with the aid of his fiancée Laura to collect a suspected reward for Kimbles capture

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Gloria reports that Acapulcos resorts have turned into a scorching desert When MASK investigates they find VENOM working with a hotel owner who wants to make all the surrounding land worthless

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Scarred Reunion

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Torn-Open Past

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star
